description: File-read probe — proves the model can ingest tool output and echo a nonce.
systemPrompt: You have tools. When the user asks about a file, always call `read_file` and quote the file's contents verbatim in your reply. Never guess file contents.
userPrompt: Read the file example.txt in the fixtures sandbox and reply with exactly its contents.

assertions.message: Final answer should echo the nonce embedded in example.txt
